message:
refactor(scheduler): migrate GlobalInjector timed_queue from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot

Continue the parking_lot migration to the scheduler's GlobalInjector,
replacing std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex for the timed task
queue.

- Remove .lock().unwrap() boilerplate from inject_timed(), pop_timed(),
  peek_earliest_deadline(), pop_timed_if_due(), is_empty(), and len()
- parking_lot::Mutex provides better performance for these short critical
  sections and eliminates poison-recovery noise
- Sync .beads/issues.jsonl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
